data.name: Dragon Conqueror
data.detailed_description:
"Dragon Conqueror" is an RPG game produced by BanameiR and published by Hanabi games.

The dragons are long gone. The Dragon Hunt Frenzy made sure of it. But Rayleigh, the disciple of the Sword Saint, is still trapped in the past. Memories of the whole village getting turned into stone, Black Dragon, and Pied Piper come to haunt her every night... She tried to find out what really happened since then, but to no avail. One day, she finds an article about a sighting of The Black Dragon. Anxious, yet excited she rushed out of her home to embark on a journey to discover the truth. It's a journey of fateful encounters, evil schemes, but most importantly a journey of facing her past and her true self.

  • JRPG

  • Puzzle and Escape Mechanics

  • Captivating Storyline

data.short_description: The dragons are long gone. The Dragon Hunt Frenzy made sure of it. But Rayleigh, the disciple of the Sword Saint, is still trapped in the past. Memories of the whole village getting turned into stone, Black Dragon, and Pied Piper come to haunt her every night...

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
